# Sai Sujan S

## About
Sai Sujan S is a Full-Stack Developer specializing in React.js, Next.js, and TypeScript, with production experience building enterprise e-commerce platforms (PDP, PLP, checkout, account systems) using Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB, plus independent ownership of SEO-optimized, high-performance websites built with Astro.

## Skills
- Frontend: React.js, Next.js, Astro, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap
- Languages: JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs
- Database: MongoDB
- Other: SEO, Web Accessibility (WCAG), Core Web Vitals, Performance Optimization

## Experience Highlights
- **AIEnterprise Inc. (Feb 2025 – Present)** — Software Engineer
- **BrandsMart USA** (React.js, Next.js, REST APIs): Owned the Account module (12+ pages) end-to-end, led Authentication and the Product Detail Page, delivered 60% of Checkout, and shipped 800+ user stories with 300+ defects resolved. Earned a Spot Award and early promotion.
- **FogLifter** (Astro, WordPress): Led a 59-page corporate site rebuild from WordPress to Astro, achieving 90+ Lighthouse scores across all pages.
- **VSO** (Astro, Ongoing): Independently driving a ground-up website rebuild for a compliance-focused enterprise client — architecture, SEO, accessibility, and deployment.
- **Allen Brothers** (React.js): Delivered core e-commerce experiences — PDP, Quick View, Category Listing, custom image zoom — for a production storefront.
- Personal projects: Chat-Sphere (real-time MERN chat app), Vastra Atelier (multi-theme e-commerce UI concept), BMSAlerts (Node.js + Puppeteer automation bot).
